activities_projects.title: Battle of Plassey Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the causes and impact of the Battle of Plassey
steps: Read about the Battle of Plassey
List the main causes of the battle
Write the consequences of the battle in India
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze an important historical event
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Map Study – Expansion of Company Rule
activities_projects.objective: Identify regions where the East India Company expanded its control
steps: Locate Bengal, Awadh, and Mysore on the map
Mark places related to major battles
Shade areas that came under Company control after these battles
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves geographical understanding of historical events

activities_projects.title: Important Figures Research
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of key personalities
steps: Choose one personality like Robert Clive, Mir Jafar, or Tipu Sultan
Write their role in the expansion of the Company
Present your findings in 5–6 points

activities_projects.title: Cause–Effect Chart
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how events led to Company rule
steps: Choose events such as the Battle of Buxar or the grant of Diwani
Write the causes leading to the event
Write the effects that followed
activities_projects.evaluation: Logical relationship between causes and effects (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Trading Company to Ruler
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the East India Company became a political power
steps: List the main ways the Company gained power in India
Explain how trade helped them gain political control
Write a short explanation in 6–8 lines
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the transition from trade to governance

activities_projects.title: Comparison Table – Indian Rulers vs Company
steps: Create a table with two columns: Indian rulers and East India Company
Write strengths and weaknesses of each side
Discuss how this affected historical outcomes

activities_projects.title: Battle Report Writing
activities_projects.objective: Develop reporting skills using historical events
steps: Choose a battle like Buxar or Plassey
Write a short report describing what happened
Include date, place, leaders, and result

activities_projects.title: Historical Debate
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group argues that Company rule benefited trade
The other group argues it harmed Indian rulers

activities_projects.title: Flowchart of Company Expansion
steps: List key events from the chapter
Arrange them in a flowchart format
Show how one event led to another

activities_projects.title: Historical Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Encourage deeper thinking about colonial rule
steps: Write a short paragraph on how Company rule changed India
Mention political or economic changes
Share your thoughts in class
